title: Extract verifiable claims
summary: Pull out the discrete, checkable claims a document makes, separating fact-claims from opinions.
body:
Read the document and list its discrete claims.

For each claim output: { text, type: fact|opinion|prediction, how_to_check }.

Keep claims atomic — one assertion each. Do not editorialize. If a claim is unverifiable, mark how_to_check as 'not checkable'.
